eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED MONTHLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Island; Jefferson; Kitsap; Snohomish; Pierce; King, WA; at 1:29 PM on MAR 4, 2019 Effective until 2:29 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a test of the emergency alert system for Kitsap, Island, Jefferson, Snohomish, Pierce and King counties of Washington State.  This is only a test. If this had been a real emergency you would be given instructions on what actions to take. The following tones will conclude this test.
